properties.name: Schnee Eifel Ridge
properties.description: Fortified ridge where two regiments of the 106th Division were surrounded

properties.name: Elsenborn Ridge
properties.description: The unbreakable northern shoulder — V Corps held here throughout the battle

properties.name: Bastogne
properties.description: Critical crossroads — 7 major roads converge here

properties.name: St. Vith
properties.description: Key road junction controlling access to the Meuse

properties.name: Malmedy
properties.description: Site of the infamous massacre of 84 American POWs

properties.name: Houffalize
properties.description: Junction town where the American pincers met on Jan 16

properties.name: Clervaux
properties.description: Site of the heroic stand at Clervaux Castle

properties.name: Wiltz
properties.description: 28th Division HQ, fell on Dec 19

properties.name: Echternach
properties.description: Southern shoulder held by the 4th Infantry Division

properties.name: Stavelot
properties.description: Kampfgruppe Peiper's critical fuel depot target

properties.name: La Gleize
properties.description: Where Peiper's spearhead was finally trapped

properties.name: Celles
properties.description: High-water mark of the German advance

properties.name: Losheim Gap
properties.description: Thinly defended gap between V and VIII Corps — main German penetration route

properties.name: Ambleve River
properties.description: Critical waterway along Peiper's advance route

properties.name: Ourthe River
properties.description: Natural defense line blocking German advance to the Meuse

properties.name: Clerf River
properties.description: 28th Infantry Division fought delaying actions along this river

properties.name: Spa
properties.description: First Army headquarters, evacuated Dec 19 as Peiper approached

properties.name: Dinant
properties.description: Key Meuse River crossing point, ultimate German objective

properties.name: Trois-Ponts
properties.description: Engineers blew bridges here, forcing Peiper to divert south

properties.name: Rocherath-Krinkelt
properties.description: Fierce fighting as 2nd and 99th Divisions held against 12th SS Panzer

properties.name: Lanzerath
properties.description: 18-man Intelligence & Reconnaissance Platoon delayed entire division

properties.name: Vielsalm
properties.description: Assembly point for 7th Armored Division's withdrawal from St. Vith

properties.name: Noville
properties.description: Team Desobry of 10th Armored fought desperate delaying action

properties.name: Foy
properties.description: Village north of Bastogne, scene of heavy fighting

properties.name: Wardin
properties.description: Eastern approach to Bastogne

properties.name: Marvie
properties.description: Southern approach to Bastogne, scene of German penetration attempts

properties.name: Longvilly
properties.description: Eastern outpost of Bastogne defense, overrun Dec 19

properties.name: Dasburg
properties.description: German crossing point on the Our River

properties.name: Monschau
properties.description: Northernmost point of the battle, held firmly by US forces

properties.name: Cheneux
properties.description: Village near La Gleize where Peiper's force was trapped
